description: Spinbot.net provides text rewriting and article extraction tools. Its service lets users rewrite articles, generate spintax, and extract main article content from URLs.
summary: spinbot.net exposes one authenticated HTTP API for article rewriting/spinning, spintax generation, article extraction, and account-credit lookup; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.

surfaces.name: Spinbot Article Rewriter and Article Extractor API
